name: Fresh Halibut Baked with Smoked Salmon
recipeIngredient: 1/8 lb Kippered salmon (soft-smoked), cut into 1/4 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet over medium flame until very hot but not smoking.
2. Brown halibut steaks quickly for 2 minutes on each side.
3. Add lemon juice and sherry; season with pepper to taste.
4. Heat the mixture for 1 minute only, then remove from heat.
5. Place halibut in a shallow glass dish and pour pan juices over it.
6. Garnish with nuts and smoked salmon.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or until fish flakes with a fork.
